title: Regional Commercial Director
description:
We are seeking an experienced Regional Commercial Director to lead business performance, profitability, and commercial strategy across Southeast Asia. This role holds regional accountability for sales planning, pricing governance, margin management, and cross-market execution, ensuring sustainable and profitable growth.

The successful candidate will partner closely with regional and global stakeholders to translate business objectives into actionable commercial plans, drive performance discipline, and elevate commercial standards across all markets and channels.

Key Responsibilities

  • Own regional commercial strategy to deliver sales, margin, and profitability targets.
  • Lead regional forecasting, budgeting, and performance review processes.
  • Oversee pricing architecture, margin optimization, and commercial governance.
  • Drive sales planning cycles and joint business planning with partners.
  • Monitor KPIs by market, category, and key products to maximise productivity.
  • Identify expansion opportunities and assess store and channel performance.
  • Align closely with finance, marketing, operations, supply chain, and training teams.
  • Represent the region in global commercial and business review forums.
  • Support distributor engagement, business model reviews, and market development initiatives.

    Requirements:
  • More than 10 years of commercial or business leadership experience in consumer, beauty, luxury, or FMCG industries.
  • Proven track record managing multi-market business performance and P&L.
  • Strong expertise in commercial planning, margin management, and sales optimisation.
  • Experience working with distributors or partners.
  • Highly analytical with strong negotiation and stakeholder management skills.
  • Able to operate strategically while driving disciplined execution

postedCompany.description:
iDA'SG is now known as World Mode Singapore.


World Mode Singapore is a specialist retail consultancy with end-to-end integrated solutions for retail professionals and retail clients. We are a wholly-owned subsidiary of World Mode Holdings Co. Ltd, a Japanese retail consultancy with a strong track record and largest market share of recruiting retail professionals for Japan's Beauty and Fashion industries. We meet each talent personally to assess their skill sets and understand their career interests before matching the right talents to the clients. Pursuing beyond the capabilities of a recruitment agency, we offer specially curated training programmes for talents to enhance their skills through blended learning.


We offer total human resource services solution that includes:

  • Permanent Placement
  • Temp/Contract Placement
  • Outsourcing Placement
  • Bulk/Mass Hiring Projects
  • Training Consultation
  • Work Pass/Payroll Services

Our mission is to fulfil the career dreams of individuals; believing happy retail professionals bring about happy shoppers and happy retail businesses.


We have 29 offices in Japan and in 5 countries (Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, Taiwan and Australia).
postedCompany.name: WORLD MODE SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
